summary: Tested dynamic onboarding steps feature end-to-end: backend function tests (direct import), API integration tests, and frontend tracking/CRM page rendering. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend rendering verified for all new step types.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test schools: TEST_Dynamic_School_*, TEST_TrackPage_School, TEST_Renewal_School - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic onboarding steps feature is fully functional. generate_dynamic_onboarding_steps returns correct step sets for all 4 scenarios: individual+teacher_training (9 steps), lab_setup+student_training (11 steps), lab_setup+both+renewal (12 steps), empty/defaults (9 steps). init-onboarding uses dynamic steps (not hardcoded DEFAULT_ONBOARDING_STEPS). Public tracking endpoint returns only actual workflow steps (no ghost steps). update_onboarding_step rejects invalid keys with 400. Frontend AdminSchoolCRM shows dynamic step counts (1/10, 2/10 etc - not hardcoded /9). SchoolTrackingPage renders all new icons: lab_setup (Building2), lab_refilling (Package), teacher_allocation (User), teacher_approval (ThumbsUp).

tested_features.generate_dynamic_onboarding_steps_indivi: PASS - 9 steps: payment_collection, kit_delivery, distribution_checking, technical_check, teacher_training, calendar_making, mou_signing, lms_setup, school_confirmation
tested_features.generate_dynamic_onboarding_steps_lab_st: PASS - 11 steps: includes lab_setup, teacher_allocation, teacher_approval, timetable_finalization; excludes distribution_checking, teacher_training
tested_features.generate_dynamic_onboarding_steps_lab_bo: PASS - 12 steps: lab_refilling (not lab_setup), teacher_training, teacher_allocation, teacher_approval, timetable_finalization
tested_features.init_onboarding_uses_dynamic_steps: PASS - verified via API for individual+teacher, lab+student, lab+both+renewal scenarios
tested_features.public_tracking_no_ghost_steps: PASS - only actual workflow steps returned, not hardcoded list
tested_features.public_tracking_mou_first: PASS - mou_signing is first step in public tracking response
tested_features.public_tracking_dynamic_progress: PASS - total_steps is dynamic (11 for lab+student, 12 for renewal), not hardcoded 9
tested_features.update_valid_step: PASS - payment_collection update returns 200 with completed=true
tested_features.update_invalid_step_400: PASS - distribution_checking returns 400 for lab_setup school
tested_features.update_advances_current_step: PASS - after completing payment_collection, current_step advances to kit_delivery
tested_features.tracking_page_lab_setup_icon: PASS - Building2 icon renders for lab_setup step
tested_features.tracking_page_teacher_allocation_icon: PASS - User icon renders for teacher_allocation step
tested_features.tracking_page_teacher_approval_icon: PASS - ThumbsUp icon renders for teacher_approval step
tested_features.tracking_page_timetable_icon: PASS - Clock icon renders for timetable_finalization step
tested_features.tracking_page_no_ghost_steps: PASS - No distribution_checking for lab_setup+student_training school
tested_features.tracking_page_renewal_lab_refilling: PASS - lab_refilling shown (not lab_setup) for renewal with is_renewal=true
